title: 3 Stocks to Buy From Transport Equipment & Leasing Industry
text: The Zacks Industry Rank for the Transportation Equipment & Leasing industry paints a rosy picture. WAB, TRTN and GATX are well-positioned to make the most of the bullish scenario.

title: 6 Reasons Why You Should Add Wabtec (WAB) to Your Portfolio
text: Wabtec (WAB) raises its 2023 sales view in the range of $9.25-$9.50 billion (prior view: $8.7-$9 billion).
